name: Small Business Sale and Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption (QSBC)
description: Complete Clara Fortin's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return in StudioTax 2024 using the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\fortin\. Report the sale of her small business, claim the Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption, and include all other provided tax slips. Save the completed return to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\clara_fortin.24t.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4037 (Capital Gains) 2024; CRA Form T657 (Capital Gains Exemption)
metadata.key_complexity: Sale of Qualified Small Business Corporation (QSBC) shares; Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption (LCGE) via Form T657; T5 Ineligible Dividends (Box 10); Public share loss.
